  path={"/rest/financing/v2/applications"}
  context={"endpoint"}

set"},"repaymentExamples":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"amountToPay":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["FAVOURITE"]}},"installment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"maturityTextForm":{"type":"string"},"numberOfInstallments":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"FinancingRepaymentExample"}}},"title":"FinancingLoanWalletSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Cash financing type","enum":["CASH_LOAN","LOAN_WALLET"]}},"title":"FinancingCashFinancing"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Status","enum":["TO_PAY","IN_PROCESS","CANCELED","PAID"]}},"title":"FinancingCash"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["items","status"],"properties":{"downPayment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"items":{"type":"array","description":"List of items on the order","items":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1"}},"title":"FinancingOrderItemBase"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (eshop, POS shop)"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Order status","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","CANCELED","PAID","TERMINATED"]}},"title":"FinancingV2OrderMinimal"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of the financed subject","enum":["CASH","LIABILITY","ORDER","WALLET"]}},"title":"FinancingV2FinancedSubjectMinimal"},"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Application status","enum":["CREATED","VERIFICATION","PRESCORED","APPROVED","REJECTED","ALTERNATIVE","CONFIRMED","CANCELLED"]},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","description":"Collection of application process actions available for current application status","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"cancellation":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ANOTHER_APPLICATION_IN_PROGRESS","DIFFERENT_REGISTER_DATA","INCONSISTENT_VERIFICATION_DATA","MISMATCH_REPRESENTATIVE","MISSING_OFFER","PARAMETERS_CHANGED","UNDEFINED","UNSUPPORTED_CLIENT_SEGMENT","UNSUPPORTED_PROCESS","VERIFICATION_INVALID","WITHDRAWAL_FROM_CONTRACT"]}},"title":"Cancellation"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Workflow code","enum":["CANCELLATION","DELIVERY","REDIRECT"]},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","description":"Is the step mandatory"},"priority":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Priority of the workflowstep"},"redirect":{"type":"object","properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Redirect user to this URL to complete this application."}},"title":"FinancingRedirectUrl"}},"title":"FinancingWorkflowStep"}}},"title":"FinancingV2ApplicationBasicInformation"}},"pagingInfo":{"type":"object","properties":{"itemsPerPage":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"limit":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Current limit"},"nextPage":{"type":"string"},"offset":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Current offset"},"prevPage":{"type":"string"}},"title":"PagingInfo"}},"title":"PageOfFinancingV2ApplicationBasicInformation"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
